extortion.description: [AI generated] Convention.qc.ca is the website for Quebec City Convention Centre, located in Quebec, Canada. This venue is one the largest convention centers in Canada, providing spaces for exhibitions, meetings, and events. It is known for its modern facilities, its environmental commitment, and for providing a wide range of services like event planning, catering, and technical support. It hosts up to 200 events annually, attracting thousands of attendees worldwide.
